commands.name: init-config
commands.summary: Create a default astockit.json file.

commands.name: registry
commands.summary: Print bundle, skill, or runtime registry metadata.

commands.name: watchlist-import
commands.summary: Normalize raw watchlist text or files into resolved symbols and unresolved items.

commands.name: market-recap
commands.summary: Render CN or US market-review blueprints as markdown or prompt blocks.

commands.name: fundamental-context
commands.summary: Fetch best-effort fundamental, capital-flow, and dragon-tiger context with explicit status fields.

commands.name: decision-dashboard
commands.summary: Build a batch conditional-action dashboard over multiple symbols.

commands.name: market-brief
commands.summary: Run the default one-symbol brief and persist the descriptive, decision, and plan bundle.

commands.name: market-data
commands.summary: Normalize market data, review one-symbol data quality, and optionally export the enriched frame.

commands.name: market-analyze
commands.summary: Render descriptive market-state interpretation from the normalized snapshot.

commands.name: decision-support
commands.summary: Compute conditional action, quantity, and risk framing for one symbol.

commands.name: strategy-design
commands.summary: Design a conditional execution plan, zones, and monitoring checklist for one symbol.

commands.name: market-screen
commands.summary: Rank a candidate universe using the shared market-state score.

commands.name: stock-data
commands.summary: Assemble a reusable structured snapshot with indicators and fail-open context.

commands.name: news-intel
commands.summary: Rank manual or file-backed headlines into bounded catalyst, risk, and narrative blocks.

commands.name: analysis
commands.summary: Render a deeper multi-block research packet for one symbol and persist artifacts.

commands.name: backtest-evaluator
commands.summary: Evaluate a saved run or deterministic strategy simulation against later price action.

commands.name: paper-trading
commands.summary: Apply JSON-backed paper trades with local ledger updates and A-share settlement rules.

commands.name: model-capability-advisor
commands.summary: Recommend heuristic quick and deep model pairings for workflow design.

commands.name: session-status
commands.summary: Inspect runtime context, artifact locations, and recent workflow history.

commands.name: feishu-notify
commands.summary: Send a fail-open outbound Feishu notification card.
